source._note: Re-sourced from real OSM highway=raceway way 1134026181 at Fountain, CO (reversed to CW winding), resampled to 3 m via scripts.gps.from_track. Real 1.03-mi D-oval; elevation from USGS 3DEP (real ~2 m sunken bowl, do not flatten).

road_profile._doc: Real PPIR banking ~10 deg in the two turn arcs (outside edge up), flat on the front/back straights. Turn stations derived from the re-sourced OSM oval's curvature: turn_1_2 ~60-513 m, turn_3_4 ~933-1356 m of the 1650 m lap; start/finish is on the front straight (station 0). NOT a whole-loop constant roll (that was the old cone/volcano). bank_deg sign verified empirically after build so the OUTSIDE edge is higher (negative lifts the outside on this reversed-CW OSM ring); flip sign if it domes inward.
